benefits.description: Effective appetite suppression to help with hunger during cut

side_effects.description: Appetite suppression so strong had to force feed to get daily calories and protein in, protein intake dropped

protocol_notes: User notes difficulty maintaining disciplined nutrition intake due to extreme appetite suppression. Plans to use Tirzepatide sparingly for future cuts and mentally prepare for ensuring correct eating. Mentioned finding themselves forgetting about meals then getting hungry and binging on less ideal foods.
